homePage.badge: VPN Setup • Privacy Guides • Secure Browsing
homePage.description: Learn how to set up VPN apps, secure your devices, choose the right servers, unlock safe browsing, and follow step-by-step VPN guides from VPNHUB.

tutorialsPage.description: Browse all remaining VPNHUB tutorials. Homepage tutorials are hidden here so users can explore the rest of your VPN guides.
tutorialsPage.sectionDescription: These tutorials are not currently shown on the homepage.

videosPage.badge: VPN Videos • Setup Walkthroughs • Security Lessons
videosPage.description: Watch VPNHUB video tutorials for VPN setup, Hiddify setup, Android VPN, Windows VPN, secure browsing, privacy protection, and server management.
videosPage.sectionDescription: Watch practical VPN tutorials and setup walkthroughs.

aboutPage.badge: About VPNHUB • Privacy Education • VPN Learning
aboutPage.description: VPNHUB helps users understand VPN setup, online privacy, secure browsing, streaming access, and server management through simple tutorials and guides.
aboutPage.mainParagraphOne: VPNHUB is a tutorial-focused platform for people who want to learn VPN setup, privacy protection, secure browsing, and server management without confusion.
aboutPage.mainParagraphTwo: Our goal is to make VPN learning simple, practical, and useful for beginners, freelancers, remote workers, and privacy-focused users.
aboutPage.missionText: We believe internet privacy should be understandable for everyone. VPNHUB is built to explain VPN tools in a clear way so users can make better decisions, protect their data, and browse more safely.

cards.title: Privacy Guides
cards.text: Learn how VPNs protect your traffic, hide your IP, and reduce privacy risks online.

cards.title: Device Tutorials
cards.text: Follow Android, iOS, Windows, router, and browser-based VPN setup tutorials.

cards.title: Server Knowledge
cards.text: Understand VPN server locations, speed, routing, streaming, and connection basics.

cards.title: Video Lessons
cards.text: Watch visual VPN walkthroughs and practical step-by-step privacy lessons.
